sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75490" key="o)rxh/stria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρχήστ-ρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀρχηστήρ,</foreign> <sense id="n75490.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dancing girl,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:95" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.95</biblScope></bibl>, Hellenistic acc. to Moer.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:p.279" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.279</biblScope> </bibl> P.</sense> </entryFree>
